title: module 1
content:
students should collect the necessary data for the design
of water treatment plant, complete the quantity estimation and design pumps and pipe
appurtenances.
Stage 2: After completing

title: module 2
content:
students should design sedimentation tanks along with
necessary parameters like coagulant dosage.
Stage 3: After completing

title: module 3
content:
students should design the filtration and disinfection
system.
Stage 4: After completing

title: module 4
content:
students should design a water distribution network and
network analysis to be done using EPANET.
Stage 5: The whole project along with layout of treatment plant and distribution network to be
presented before the panel.
